'''Hako Armado''', an elderly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], was known as a skilled dramatist operating during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Few realized that this was but a pretense, and that Hako was in fact a deadly [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]].

With the spikes atop his head going gray with age, Armado kept his identity as an assassin secret from all but a few beings. Fewer still knew that many of Hako's supposed "kills" were in fact fakes—arranged by the targets themselves to escape trouble.
